title: deep-wiki index payload v1.0
description: Authoritative payload schema for deep-wiki index envelope (artifact_kind=index, schema.version=1.0). Mirrors deep-wiki v1.5.0+ emit shape from Phase 2 envelope adoption. Multi-source aggregator over <wiki_root>/pages/*.md — no parent_run_id; provenance.source_artifacts carries page paths (path-only, markdown not envelope-detectable). pages array MAY be empty (fresh wiki / post-wiki-setup case).

pages.description: Catalog of pages under <wiki_root>/pages/. Defense-in-depth requirement on writer (round-2 HIGH-B) — non-array payload.pages is rejected at write boundary.

generated_at.description: Optional payload-internal generation timestamp (envelope-level generated_at is canonical).

wiki_root.description: Optional absolute path to the wiki root (legacy compat — newer emits favor envelope.git context).
